expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly sets the focus and structures coverage around the three required dimensions: "Focus: Donut-chart data label coverage distinguishing **label visibility**, **density**, and **overlap-sensitive outcomes**." It further breaks down sections "A. Label visibility rules (show/hide)", "B. Label density (slice count & distribution)", and "C. Overlap-sensitive outcomes (collision/space handling)", and includes scenario coverage and assertions that record visibility count, overlap status, and collision policy evidence.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "Phase 4a QA Plan Artifact" and repeatedly anchors to phase4a: "Primary phase under test: phase4a", "Phase 4a Objective (Checkpoint Contract)", "Phase 4a Test Design — Minimal Scenario Set", and "Exit Criteria for Phase 4a (Advisory)"—indicating the deliverable is a phase4a plan artifact rather than a later-phase execution report.
